CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2017 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-03-2017 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-20-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Dec-15-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Pamela C. Jackson (707-446-2333) for Plaintiff/Moving party Parkview Edge Properties, LLC.
Devin Niemann (408-673-7892) of Legal Assistance to the Elderly for Defendant/opposing party FLEUR FOSTER
SHEIBA BOISSIERE (415-240-7891) in pro per Defendant/Moving party.

Hearing is held. The court indicates the motion did not comply with the rules. The plaintiff submits to the tentative. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF PARKVIEW EDGE PROPERTIES, LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication is DENIED. Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Adjudication is DENIED. Plaintiff's Separate Statement and the improperly filed Amended Separate Statement fail to comply with CRC 3.1350(b). Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED there is a triable issue of fact regarding existence of the tenancy. The Court also notes that Plaintiff's Separate Statement is devoid of any facts regarding non-existence of tenancy.

Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Dec-15-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Pamela C. Jackson (707-446-2333) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Parkview Edge Properties, LLC.
Devin Niemann (408-673-7892) of Legal Assistance to the Elderly for Defendant/Moving party FLEUR FOSTER
SHEIBA BOISSIERE (415-240-7891) in pro per Defendant/Moving party.

The Court announces the tentative ruling and indicates that defense counsel did not comply with rules. Defense claims it was accidental oversight. The court hears no further argument and rules as follows:

DEFENDANT FLEUR FOSTER, SHEIBA BOISSIERE's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b). See Notice of Motion and Separate Statement.
Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

Plaintiffs Notice Of Hearing Re Request For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-25-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840

Pamela C. Jackson, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Parkview Edge Properties, LLC,
No appearance by defaulted defendants Fleur Foster and Sheiba Boissiere,
Default of Defendants has been duly entered,
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-20 dismissed without prejudice.
Witness: Natalia Carney Sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:
The Three-Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit issued by Plaintiff is and shall be rescinded and no tenancy was created.
Plaintiff shall have and recover the Possession of the Property located at 318 Victoria Street, City and County of San Francisco, CA 90278 from Defendants Fleur Foster and Sheiba Boissiere.
Plaintiff shall recover damages for the possession of the Property at the rate of $116.66 per day from Nov 11, 2014 through Feb 25, 2016.

Damages: $54,946.96
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $800
Total Judgment in the amount of $55,746.96

Judgment signed in open court.
